boids.config.title: Boids Configuration
boids.config.separation_influence.desc: How strongly boids repel each other at close range.
boids.config.separation_range.desc: Distance within which separation force applies.
boids.config.separation_angle.desc: Field of view angle for separation (degrees).
boids.config.alignment_influence.desc: How strongly boids align their direction with neighbors.
boids.config.alignment_angle.desc: Field of view angle for alignment (degrees).
boids.config.cohesion_influence.desc: How strongly boids move toward the center of nearby boids.
boids.config.cohesion_angle.desc: Field of view angle for cohesion (degrees).
boids.config.randomness.desc: Amount of random movement added each tick.
boids.config.include_default_fish.desc: Include salmon, cod, and tropical fish by default.
